nasb.text: Therefore repent and return, so that your sins may be wiped away, in order that times of refreshing may come from the presence of the Lord;

esv.text: Repent therefore, and turn back, that your sins may be blotted out,

cnv.text: 所以你們應當悔改歸正，使你們的罪得著塗抹。

ccb.text: 所以你们要悔改，归向上帝，祂将除去你们一切的罪恶，

csbs.text: 所以，你们应当悔改，应当回转，使你们的罪孽被抹去，
